name: second-brain-os
description: Second Brain OS — a build-in-public AI second-brain template for Obsidian. Two-vault hard privacy separation (public-share + private-substrate). Coding-agent-native. Composes the Starlight Intelligence Protocol (SIP) substrate.
principles: Hard privacy separation — no public surface ever reads from private
Coding-agent-native — every workflow runnable by Claude Code / Cursor / etc.
Obsidian as canonical UI — markdown + wikilinks + canvas
Build-in-public for the template; private for the operator
attestation: Built on SIP — Starlight Intelligence Protocol v1.1.1. License: MIT.
